use_cases: Displaying legend scales for data visualization charts
Showing categorical color scales in analytics dashboards
Rendering threshold-based legends for gradient data representations
Displaying size-based legends for bubble or scatter charts
Showing ordinal legends for categorical data groupings
ai_summary: A comprehensive legend component from Airbnb's design system that renders multiple legend types including linear, quantile, ordinal, threshold, and size scales. Built on the visx visualization library, it supports various color schemes with gradient transitions and custom shapes. Designed for data-heavy SaaS applications, dashboards, and analytics platforms requiring clear data scale representations.
